job_name: Financial Services Cloud (FSC) Developer / Tech Lead / Architect
job_desc:
Job Summary





Job Title: Salesforce Financial Services Cloud Developer / Lead / Architect
Location: Bangalore, India
Experience Required: 5–15 Years
Certifications: Salesforce Certified (Financial Services Cloud, Service Cloud, or equivalent)
Summary
We’re seeking a highly experienced and certified Salesforce SME with deep expertise in Financial Services Cloud (FSC) and Contact Center solutions. This role is pivotal in bridging business needs with technical execution, driving digital transformation across financial services operations and customer engagement platforms. You’ll lead solution design, stakeholder collaboration, and platform optimization for high-impact service delivery.
Key Responsibilities
•Act as an interface between business units and technical teams to align Salesforce related requirements and configuration
•Support implementation and optimization of Salesforce FSC and Service Cloud for contact center operations.
•Design scalable solutions for customer onboarding, relationship management, and service automation.
•Integrate Salesforce with core systems, data platforms, third-party apps, and telephony platforms (e.g., CTI, IVR).
•Develop and manage customer journeys, case workflows, and omni-channel service strategies.
•Ensure compliance with financial regulations and data privacy standards.
•Conduct stakeholder workshops, training sessions, and platform demos to drive adoption.
•Stay current with Salesforce releases, especially FSC, Service Cloud, and AI-driven service enhancements.
Skills & Qualifications
•5–8 years of hands-on experience in Salesforce, with strong exposure to Financial Services Cloud and Data Cloud.
•Salesforce certifications such as Financial Services Cloud Consultant, Service Cloud Consultant, or Application Architect.
•Proven ability to translate financial business processes into technical solutions.
•Experience with contact center technologies, including CTI integration, case routing, and service analytics.
•Strong understanding of financial products, customer lifecycle management, and regulatory compliance.
•Proficiency in Apex, Flow, Lightning Components, and data modeling.
•Excellent communication, stakeholder engagement, and problem-solving skills.
•Knowledge of Genesys Cloud is an added advantage.

Job Summary

Job Title: Senior Project Manager Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES)
Location: TechM, Pune Sharda
Years of Experience: 10 15 Years
Job Summary:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Project Manager with a strong background in Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES), specifically Drona MES and FTPC MES. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of managing complex projects within the manufacturing sector, ensuring the successful implementation and optimization of MES solutions. This role requires a strategic thinker with excellent leadership skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross functional teams.
Responsibilities:

Lead and manage MES projects from initiation to completion, ensuring alignment with business objectives and timelines.
Collaborate with stakeholders to define project scope, goals, and deliverables that support business objectives.
Develop detailed project plans, including resource allocation, timelines, and risk management strategies.
Oversee the implementation of Drona MES and FTPC MES, ensuring adherence to best practices and industry standards.
Monitor project progress and performance, making adjustments as necessary to ensure successful outcomes.
Facilitate communication between project teams, stakeholders, and senior management to ensure transparency and alignment.
Conduct regular project reviews and provide status updates to stakeholders.
Identify and mitigate project risks, ensuring proactive problem solving and decision making.
Mentor and guide junior project managers and team members, fostering a culture of continuous improvement.

Mandatory Skills:

Strong expertise in Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES), specifically Drona MES and FTPC MES.
Proven experience in project management methodologies and tools.
Excellent leadership and team management skills.
Strong analytical and problem solving abilities.
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work in a fast paced environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred Skills:

Experience with Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma methodologies.
Familiarity with ERP systems and their integration with MES.
Knowledge of industry regulations and compliance standards.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent.

Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field; Master's degree preferred.
10 15 years of experience in project management within the manufacturing sector.
Demonstrated success in managing MES projects and delivering results.

If you are a results driven professional with a passion for manufacturing execution systems and a desire to lead impactful projects, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

Job Title: Support Engineer
Location: Bangalore / Pune
Experience: 5â€¿10 years in SAP BASIS & HANA DB
Shift: 24x7, WFO
Job Summary
We seek an experienced SAP Basis Administrator to provide L2/L3 support for complex SAP landscapes, including S/4HANA, Solution Manager, BTP, Azure hosted environments, and SAP Web applications. The ideal candidate will demonstrate deep expertise in BASIS and HANA/Sybase database administration, proactive issue resolution, and cross functional coordination in a managed service delivery model. This role demands operational excellence, SLA adherence, and continuous learning in a dynamic global support setup.
Key Responsibilities
Deliver L2/L3 technical support for SAP BASIS infrastructure in line with SLAs and KPIs.
Manage SAP systems including S/4HANA, Solman, BTP, and SAP Web apps hosted on Azure.
Perform upgrades, kernel patching, add on installs, and SSL certificate management.
Administer HANA and Sybase databases: backup, recovery, tuning, and space management.
Execute BASIS operations: system refreshes, client copies, parameter changes, job scheduling, RFC configuration, and SICF services.
Handle P1/P2 incidents with urgency, ensuring timely resolution and de escalation.
Monitor performance, memory usage, and troubleshoot critical issues across landscapes.
Participate in RCA, documentation, and continuous improvement initiatives.
Coordinate with cross functional teams for seamless 24/7 global support.
Track and report SLA/KPI metrics; ensure ITIL compliance.
Support onboarding and mentoring of juniors; contribute to knowledge sharing.
Stay current with SAP technologies and pursue cross skilling opportunities.
Participate in team meetings, service reviews, and governance forums.
Prior ECS (Enterprise Cloud Services) experience is an advantage.
Required Skills & Competencies
Strong hands on SAP BASIS administration (5â€¿10 years).
Proficiency in S/4HANA, Solman, BTP, and SAP Web apps.
Expertise in HANA and Sybase database operations.
Solid grasp of system architecture, tuning, and memory management.
Experience in managed service delivery and global support.
Familiarity with ITIL processes and SLA/KPI tracking.
Excellent troubleshooting, documentation, and communication skills.
Ability to work under pressure and coordinate across teams.
Willingness to work rotational shifts supporting critical operations.
